text: US Air Force B-52 bomber plane crashes after take off in California - BBC
fullText: Officials did not say if anyone was injured in the crash, but the aircraft typically carry a crew of five.

text: Nvidia Stock Retakes Key Level As Chipmaker Plans Bond Offering - Investor's Business Daily
fullText: Nvidia stock rallied Monday along with the semiconductor sector and the broader stock market. It also retook a key support level.

text: SpaceX IPO raised $10bn more than thought - BBC
fullText: The company's listing raised $87.5bn, compared with the $75bn it was initially thought.

text: Russian attack kills at least five and damages historic monastery in Kyiv - The Washington Post
fullText: UNESCO, the U.N.’s world heritage agency, condemned the attack, which damaged the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra monastery. Russia said it bombed military targets.

text: ICE agent shoots at fleeing vehicle in New Jersey after being hit by suspect, police say - CNN
fullText: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent was hit by a car and then fired his gun at the fleeing suspect Monday near Jersey Shore, Stafford Township Police say.

text: Trump is urging tankers to sail through Hormuz. Vessels aren’t so sure yet. - Politico
fullText: Vice President JD Vance said ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has already increased since a peace deal was announced, but industry associations are urging caution.

text: UFC Boss Dana White Condemns Fighter Josh Hokit for Saying ‘Michelle Obama Is a Man’: ‘I Hate That Kind of Nonsense’ - Variety
fullText: UFC boss Dana White condemned Josh Hokit's 'Michelle Obama is a man' comment at the White House Freedom 250 event, calling it 'nasty and false.'

fullText: Fox Corp. has agreed to buy streaming technology maker Roku for $160 a share, or an enterprise value of around $22 billion.
